ns0:entry.ns0:title: Augani/openreel-video
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Augani/openreel-video
Language: typescript
OpenReel Video - Professional browser-based video editor. Open source CapCut alternative. 100% browser-based, no installation, no cloud uploads, no watermarks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
Language: typescript
Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: InsForge/InsForge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/InsForge/InsForge
Language: typescript
InsForge is a Postgres-based backend with auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway. Built for coding agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/superset
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/superset
Language: typescript
Apache Superset is a Data Visualization and Data Exploration Platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/clash-verge-rev/clash-verge-rev
Language: typescript
A modern GUI client based on Tauri, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience

ns0:entry.ns0:title: code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
Language: typescript
omo; the best agent harness - previously oh-my-opencode

ns0:entry.ns0:title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
Language: typescript
Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers, RTK+Caveman stacked compression up to ~95% eligible context savings, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: directus/directus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/directus/directus
Language: typescript
The flexible backend for all your projects 🐰 Turn your DB into a headless CMS, admin panels, or apps with a custom UI, instant APIs, auth & more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: labring/FastGPT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/labring/FastGPT
Language: typescript
FastGPT is a knowledge-based platform built on the LLMs, offers a comprehensive suite of out-of-the-box capabilities such as data processing, RAG retrieval, and visual AI workflow orchestration, letting you easily develop and deploy complex question-answering systems without the need for extensive setup or configuration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langgenius/dify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langgenius/dify
Language: typescript
Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mksglu/context-mode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mksglu/context-mode
Language: typescript
Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 14 platforms

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps
Language: typescript
Official repo for spec & SDK of MCP Apps protocol - standard for UIs embedded AI chatbots, served by MCP servers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
Language: typescript
Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vercel-labs/open-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vercel-labs/open-agents
Language: typescript
An open source template for building cloud agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zhukunpenglinyutong/desktop-cc-gui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zhukunpenglinyutong/desktop-cc-gui
Language: typescript
CC GUI 客户端（专为开发者打造的VibeCoding平台）
